horoscope: This is a good time for catching your breath, dear Aries. Temporarily letting go of material goals and concerns can be helpful and healing. You are naturally inclined to pull back from situations and people who seem to demand too much of you, with the Moon in the sign just behind yours all day. Still, it's also a good time to connect you with opportunities, or a special invitation is possible. Expressing yourself through spontaneous, interesting, and perhaps unusual or creative activities can be especially rewarding right now. You may find that things seem to fall into place, and connections are made, both physically and mentally, that seem meant to be. Today is better for freeform activities than for structured learning and work, and for bringing more imagination into your life.

You find it natural to focus on long-range goals today, dear Taurus, but you also want a healthy diversion with the Moon in your social sector all day. It's a fine time for some intellectual companionship or stimulation. Conversations that revolve around personal interests and causes can be in focus. Today's energies are strong for supporting someone who needs assistance. As the day advances, you're drawn to your inner world, working behind the scenes, preparing, building inner strength, and reflecting or enjoying private time. You're learning more about your vulnerabilities, and self-acceptance is both a goal and a reward. You can find imaginative and inspired ways to boost your self-image, finances, or income.

Today's Moon has you tuning into priorities, dear Gemini. It can be satisfying to keep a goal in mind so that you can focus on it and feel directed. You tend to feel more at ease with meaningful tasks than you do with frivolous ones at the moment. Conversations are down-to-earth and useful, and giving a matter further thought may lead you to discover something that was previously a big question mark. You may be in a position to teach or guide someone or, better yet, to inspire. You're in good shape for connecting and sharing. Lively exchanges can renew your spirit. You feel particularly comfortable in your own skin and more at peace with yourself and others, especially as the day advances. A serendipitous meeting is possible now.

The Moon spends the day in your spirit sector, dear Cancer, and you have your broader goals in mind. You feel more confident and comfortable in your skin today, and you radiate good energy. You seem to be at greater ease expressing both your ideas and feelings. You crave engaging experiences and a change of scenery. You may feel a need or desire to help someone as the day progresses, or you could play a supportive role. Behind-the-scenes work is possible now. You might benefit from taking extra time and space for yourself, particularly if you need to get work done. You could very well benefit from work you've already done or past good deeds, particularly in your profession. It's a time when you might seek — and find — greater meaning and purpose in your responsibilities. It's a good period to bring more imagination and compassion to your work and to have more faith in your direction.

Your need to observe and reflect is strong today, dear Leo, and you tend to process your feelings and recent experiences. At the same time, you gravitate to situations, people, and projects that engage your emotions and absorb your attention. You're feeling more comfortable with your inner world, but you're also ready to verbalize or sort things out in your mind. However, as the day advances, resolving issues tends to be indirect, which can actually be beneficial right now. There can be pleasure in allowing others more freedom. This is a good time for forgiving, moving on, and seeing situations and people more compassionately. Your attitude is positive, and exceptional support can come from friends and associations. You’re inspired to grow and explore.

The urge to soak up ideas and inspiration from others is strong today, dear Virgo, and nice opportunities seem to emerge through networks, groups, and friends. There's something beneficial or valuable happening in your social life right now. The fluidity between your feelings and mind helps you express yourself better, and it's easier to iron out differences with others. As the day advances, there can be real solutions to uncover with business, work, or other practical affairs, but the trick is to avoid pushing to find them. In fact, this is not the time for step-by-step, logical, or structured approaches; it's better to let intuition come into play, which might mean temporarily backing off from a problem. Compassion and patience are in larger supply, and you can be especially imaginative. Energies are brilliant for increased self-acceptance and enjoyment, and possibly for learning new things about yourself or someone important to you. You see your life path, relationships, and projects with new eyes.

Taking care of details and attention to practical priorities or your health seems to satisfy you most today, dear Libra, with the Moon's transit of your solar sixth house all day. You can find it hard to ignore the need to take care of business! Accomplishing something is rewarding. You might talk comfortably and naturally about matters that previously were hidden or too private to discuss today. As the day advances, energies are less ideal for strict, structured, or overly logical activities but quite fabulous for freeform, creative activities and conversations. There can be an excellent show of support from someone or a sense that sharing beliefs and ideas leads to a deeper, improved bond. Your own self-expression improves with a greater understanding of and compassion for others.

The Moon's stay in your sector of joy and creativity all day is strong for encouraging you to enjoy and appreciate your leisure time, dear Scorpio. You're emotionally and mentally invested in your heartfelt pursuits today. As the day advances, it's a strong time for research and work if it's unplanned or creative. You can feel particularly fulfilled when you feel needed right now. Helping out can be satisfying, and you can feel inspired as you pursue your daily affairs, services, work, or wellness programs. You might see your efforts, duties, services, and chores in new ways, finding not only more joy in them but also a stronger sense of meaning and purpose.

You seem to need a greater sense of comfort, familiarity, and quiet today, dear Sagittarius, with the Moon's transit of your solar fourth house. Resolving differences comes especially naturally through conversations or mental musings. A slower pace works out well for you at the moment, as it helps you center yourself. Memories or dreams can be motivating and can give you new insight into a situation. As the day advances, energies are strong for attracting or impressing others through your words and ideas. A different way of looking at your projects, entertainment, the love in your life, your relationships, and your relationship needs can round out your experience.

The Moon spends all day in your communications sector, dear Capricorn, and you may take an active interest in learning, sharing, and connecting. You can feel particularly supported and content as the day advances, and you could be building a stronger sense of belonging or connectedness. A different, more compassionate, or spiritual view of your work, services, and health can benefit you greatly. It's a fine time to enjoy more meaning and purpose through your job, wellness programs, and family or domestic initiatives. You might also feel more valued and valuable in your duties and inspired to take better care of yourself. It's a fine time to bring more imagination to a project around the home or at work. Strict attention to detail is less successful than more freeform activities just for now.

With today's Moon in your solar second house, dear Aquarius, you're more inclined to want to build than you are to pioneer at the moment. Your focus is more on your physical and comfort needs, and you're craving some simplicity for a break. You might talk quite readily about health, work, and other practical matters today as the Moon reaches out to Mercury. While it's a time for grounding yourself, as the day advances, creative activities are a stronger draw. You're well-positioned to share and support. Others especially enjoy and benefit from your unique perspective, and your instincts for those who might need your support are strong. It’s a good time to expand your mind and connect with others through the mind, and especially to inspire.

You are expressing yourself in subtle yet effective ways today, dear Pisces. Today is strong for connecting with people or projects you love. Conversations are inspiring. You can feel a strong need for self-nurturing for a couple of days with this Moon transit, and it shouldn't be dismissed. It's a time to appreciate or make the most of your leisure time. You could find a purpose or stronger meaning through your home life, business, or family now. Improving home life can tie in with a better income or an attitude toward money and talents, or with pouring more love into attending to your money, things, and resources, which benefits your domestic world. More compassion and emotional support are available. There can be a desire to pamper, give a gift, or otherwise show your affection or concern. You may be hungry for nurturing, support, and comfort today, but if it isn’t forthcoming, don’t stress over it – pamper yourself a little.
